# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented the drain harness fix by removing the construction-time fixed bead_order and recomputing ready beads from the persisted .beads/issues.jsonl fixture on each ready_beads() call. The harness now parses current issue status, type, priority, labels, and blocking dependencies from disk, so follow-up beads appended during recovery become visible in later cycles just like production br ready. Updated the BackendExhaustedSkip harness test to prove the newly filed follow-up is selected, run through PR open/watch/merge, and closed in a third drain cycle.","outstanding_risks":["br lint could not be run because the br binary is not installed in the current PATH.","The worktree includes orchestration/backlog state changes outside the source/test edits, including .beads/issues.jsonl and untracked .ralph-burning/projects/v8dm/. I did not review or alter .ralph-burning state."],"steps":[{"order":0,"status":"completed","description":"Inspected the drain harness and confirm
